rootCause: Os componentes divergiam porque parte da renderizacao original esta em primitivas QPainter/Qt widget fora do paint principal; o LasecSimul antes caia em fallback generico ou em shapes manuais.

stillPendingGenericQtCoverage: execucao completa de if/else por estado visual
loops com transform save/translate/rotate por primitiva

items.label: Fonte de Tensao

items.label: Tensao Fixa
items.notes: non-small: m_area=QRect(-10,-10,20,20); IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); drawRoundedRect(-8,-8,16,16,2,2); brush #ffa600 when Out=true else #e6e6ff

items.label: Clock
items.notes: ClockBase m_area=QRect(-14,-8,22,16), IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); Clock::paint roundedRect(m_area,2,2), fill #fac832 running else #e6e6ff, then pulse polyline with pen width 1.
items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><rect class="toggle-hit-zone" x="0" y="0" width="16" height="16" rx="2" ry="2" stroke="#000" fill="#dddddd" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="40" y1="8" x2="48" y2="8" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><rect x="18" y="0" width="22" height="16" rx="2" ry="2" stroke="#000" fill="#e6e6ff" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M 21 11 L 21 5 L 27 5 L 27 11 L 33 11 L 33 5 L 36 5" stroke="#000" fill="none" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="miter"/></g></g>

items.label: Gerador de Onda
items.notes: ClockBase m_area=QRect(-14,-8,22,16); out pin (16,0), gnd pin (16,4) visible only when Bipolar=true; drawRoundedRect(m_area,2,2); drawPixmap(m_area.x()+3,m_area.y()+4,16,8,*m_wavePixmap).

items.label: Fonte de Tensao Variavel
items.notes: VarSource m_area=(-20,-28,40,56), proxy SourceWidget at (-18,-26), dial 36x36 at top, CustomButton 32x16 centered at y=10, out pin at (28,16). Widget primitives are converted from generic Qt paint calls: drawRoundedRect/drawEllipse/drawLine/QLinearGradient/QRadialGradient.

items.label: Fonte Controlada
items.notes: Csource::paint draws outline-only rect/diamond/arrow. Leads are rendered from Pin::paint: Pin QPoint is the electrical terminal, visual segment length is m_length-0.7 with round cap. Control +/- are Pin labels: cp/cm at (-24,-8)/(-24,8), angle 180, length 8, setFontSize(9), setSpace(1.7), labelColor red/black; labels are cleared when CurrControl=true.
items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><rect x="8" y="4" width="32" height="32" stroke="#000" fill="none" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="16,20 24,7 32,20 24,33" stroke="#000" fill="none" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="24" y1="15" x2="24" y2="25" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="22" y1="22" x2="24" y2="25" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="26" y1="22" x2="24" y2="25" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/></g></g><line x1="0.0" y1="12.0" x2="7.3" y2="12.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><text x="9.7" y="6.0" text-anchor="start" dominant-baseline="hanging" fill="#ff0000" style="font-size:9px">+</text><line x1="0.0" y1="28.0" x2="7.3" y2="28.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><text x="9.7" y="22.0" text-anchor="start" dominant-baseline="hanging" fill="#000000" style="font-size:9px">–</text><line x1="24.0" y1="0.0" x2="24.0" y2="7.3" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><line x1="24.0" y1="40.0" x2="24.0" y2="32.7" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

items.label: Trilho
items.notes: m_area=QRect(-2,-8,12,16); IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); setRotation(90); paint polygon points (-1.5,-6.5),(-1.5,6.5),(9,1),(9,-1), brush #ffa600. Lasec package keeps the local paint geometry and exposes the pin at the translated QPoint(16,0).
items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><line x1="13" y1="8" x2="20" y2="8" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><polygon points="2.5,1.5 2.5,14.5 13,9 13,7" stroke="#000" fill="#ffa600" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g></g>

items.label: Terra (0 V)
items.notes: m_area = QRect(-8,-10,16,12); IoPin(90,QPoint(0,-16)); bars at y=-8,-4,0 with pen 2.5
